overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime exploration of a neon-drenched urban plaza and downtown district. The clip begins in a crowded plaza with glowing floor tiles and cyan-lit architecture, transitions through palm-lined pedestrian walkways with heavy neon signage, and concludes with a street crossing and waterfront promenade walk alongside light vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit plaza with interactive glowing floor tiles

events.description: camera circles around the central golden sculpture while navigating through the crowd

agents.ego_description: walking through the crowded plaza, observing NPCs gathered around the glowing floor installation

notable_agents.action: group of NPCs standing in a circle, some taking photos with their phones
character in red dress standing on steps observing the scene

entered.detail: illuminated pink and cyan floor panels that change color as the player walks over them
futuristic building facade with large cyan-tinted vertical windows and neon underlighting
tall golden art installation with cables extending to the ceiling, serving as a plaza centerpiece
circular structure with glowing pink neon rings at its base

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a vibrant cyberpunk plaza at night, dominated by glowing pink floor tiles and a central golden sculpture. NPCs gather in small groups, some taking photos, while the camera navigates around the central art piece. The architecture features modern glass buildings with cyan window lighting and heavy neon illumination from overhead structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined pedestrian plaza transitioning away from the central installation

events.description: exits the crowded glowing plaza into a more open palm tree lined walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza away from the crowd, passing scattered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and red cap walking in the same direction

entered.detail: tall cylindrical digital advertising pillar displaying rotating neon advertisements
large building facade covered with bright digital billboards and cyberpunk advertisements

segments.scene_description: Leaving the crowded plaza behind, the camera enters a more spacious pedestrian area lined with palm trees. The glowing floor tiles give way to standard pavement as the environment opens up. Digital advertising columns and massive neon billboards on distant buildings become prominent features of the cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial pedestrian street with heavy neon signage and advertising

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the palm-lined commercial street, passing advertising kiosks and digital displays

entered.detail: small digital kiosk with illuminated screens displaying product advertisements
approach to a yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk with traffic signals visible
tall modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade and interior lighting visible

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along a commercial pedestrian street flanked by palm trees and digital advertising infrastructure. The path leads toward a crosswalk, with modern glass towers rising in the background. The environment maintains the cyberpunk aesthetic with persistent neon illumination from building-mounted billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection and waterfront promenade with vehicle traffic

events.description: crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk as vehicles wait at the intersection
transitioning from the crosswalk to the waterfront promenade alongside moving traffic

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk then continuing along the waterfront sidewalk alongside light vehicle traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the road with headlights on, passing by the promenade

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with thick yellow stripes and glowing green 'WALK' text on the ground
elevated highway or monorail structure with support pillars and lighting
white concrete barrier separating the pedestrian walkway from the vehicle road
white railing along the edge of what appears to be a waterfront or lower level

segments.scene_description: The final segment begins with the camera crossing a wide intersection marked by prominent yellow crosswalk stripes. After crossing, the path follows a waterfront promenade separated from the road by concrete barriers. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the right while the left side overlooks a lower level or waterway, with the city skyline and towering neon-lit buildings dominating the forward view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, enclosed cyberpunk plaza into a wide-open urban waterfront district. It begins by navigating around a golden sculpture amidst glowing pink floor tiles and cyan-lit glass architecture where crowds of NPCs gather. As the camera leaves the plaza, the glowing tiles transition into standard pavement within a spacious pedestrian area lined with palm trees and towering digital advertising columns. The path then extends along a commercial street flanked by neon billboards and glass towers before leading toward a wide intersection. Finally, the camera crosses yellow stripes at a busy junction and follows a waterfront promenade, passing futuristic vehicles while the neon-drenched city skyline dominates the horizon.
